channel.title: Arch-Linux on Stefan Gloutnikov
channel.description: Recent content in Arch-Linux on Stefan Gloutnikov

item.title: Arch Linux with Limine Bootloader Install Notes
item.description: Limine is a relatively new bootloader that looked very interesting, and I wanted to try it out on my Arch installation. Overall, I’m very happy with it and decided to keep using it. These notes are an addition to my previous Arch install notes covering installing Arch Linux with full-disk encryption and btrfs, but instead of GRUB we will use Limine as the bootloader.

item.title: btrfs Snapshot and Restore Notes (GRUB)
item.description: Notes on setting up automated btrfs snapshots with the ability to boot them from GRUB and restore them. This post targets an Arch Linux installation but is useful for any Linux system.

item.title: Arch Linux with Full Disk Encryption Install Notes
item.description: The following post outlines installing Arch Linux with full-disk encryption on a btrfs filesystem. After recently getting a Framework 13 laptop, I wanted to install Arch Linux on it with FDE to be on the safer side as well as try out btrfs system snapshots and restore capabilities.
